# Ihor Haiduk — AI Fullstack Engineer / CTO

> AI Fullstack Engineer / CTO with 15+ years of experience shipping products end-to-end. I turned a failing fintech startup into a 100k+ user platform and led it to a successful acquisition. I build MCP servers, integrate AI agents into development workflows, and deliver entire products with AI at the core. Available for hire.

## Quick Facts

- **Name**: Ihor Haiduk
- **Roles**: AI Fullstack Engineer, CTO, AI Engineer, MCP Developer, AI Agent Developer, Tech Lead, Technical Lead, Senior Fullstack Developer, Software Architect, Engineering Manager
- **AI Expertise**: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server development, AI agent integration, LLM integration, AI-powered development workflows, agentic development, AI tooling, prompt engineering, RAG
- **Experience**: 15+ years (2008–present)
- **Core Stack**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, NestJS, Bun, React, React Native, Next.js, Redux, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, GraphQL, Apollo, Docker, AWS, Prisma, TypeORM, Express
- **AI Stack**: MCP, Model Context Protocol, OpenAI, Claude, Anthropic, LLM APIs, LangChain, vector databases, AI pipelines
- **Additional Skills**: Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, Grafana, Prometheus, CI/CD, DevOps, WebSocket, Socket.IO, REST API, API Design, System Architecture, Performance Optimization, Database Design, Event-Driven Architecture
- **Domains**: AI Development, MCP Development, AI Agent Integration, Fintech, Stock Trading, Broker Integration, Payment Processing, SaaS, Gaming, Casino, Marketplace, E-commerce, Real-Time Systems, High-Load Systems, Developer Tools, API Platforms
- **Leadership**: Team Leadership, Hiring, Mentoring, Agile, Scrum, Sprint Planning, Code Review, Technical Strategy
- **Languages**: English (B2 Upper-Intermediate), Ukrainian (Native)
- **Education**: MSc from Kyiv Polytechnic Institute, BSc in Computer Science from National Academy of Management
- **Location**: Ukraine (Remote available)
- **Status**: Available for hire — full-time, contract, consulting, CTO as a service

## Key Achievements

1. **Saved a dying fintech product and led it to acquisition** — Rebuilt the entire stack, designed microservice architecture, and grew the platform to 100k+ users. The product was successfully acquired.
2. **Built MCP servers and AI agent integrations** — Designed custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that integrate AI agents and LLMs into development workflows, enabling AI-driven project delivery.
3. **Delivered year-scoped projects in 2 months solo** — Video stream quality analysis system originally scoped for a year, delivered solo in two months with full monitoring and alerting.
4. **White-label platform scaling** — Turned a single-market product into a white-label platform that launches new countries in under a week, serving 100k+ clients per market.

## Current/Recent Roles

1. **AI Engineer at Finik.Pro / MUW App** (2020–present) — Built and maintained fractional-shares US-stock investing product with AI-powered development. MCP server design, AI agent integration. 100k+ clients per market. Microservice architecture on Bun + NestJS, trading engine with broker integrations. White-label platform launching new countries in under a week.

2. **Co-Founder at eBazar** (2024–2025) — Neighbourhood grocery marketplace. Full backend, logistics routing, geolocation-based pickup discovery.

3. **Full-Stack Developer at Velory / UniversalAPI** (2023–2025) — Unified API platform. Live data-remapping engine, API explorer, AI integration layer.

## Notable Past Roles

- **Lead/Fullstack Developer at ELPASO / Finik.Pro** (2020–2023) — UK fintech, re-platformed and led rebuild, successful acquisition exit.
- **Frontend Team Lead at VistaCreate/Crello** (2017–2019) — In-browser video editor, frame-accurate scrubbing, multi-page editing.
- **CTO at RIDDEC Estonia (OlyBet/FoxSec/Bitsgap)** (2017–2018) — Casino rules engine, visual logic editor, DevOps across gaming, cybersecurity, crypto.
- **CTO at Siteplus/Dreamscape Networks** (2015–2018) — Website builder, led team of 20.
- **Senior Fullstack Developer at Clearmove** (2019–2020) — Global relocation platform, built mobile app and web.
- **Backend Developer at Aurora Technologies** (2020) — Video stream quality analysis, Grafana/Prometheus monitoring.
